testcase.name: test_create_order_with_placeholder_keys
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_monetization_credits.py:231: in test_create_order_with_placeholder_keys assert r.status_code in (200, 502, 503), f"{r.status_code} {r.text}" E AssertionError: 404 {"detail":"Pack not found or inactive"} E assert 404 in (200, 502, 503) E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_verify_invalid_signature
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_monetization_credits.py:272: in test_verify_invalid_signature assert r.status_code in (400, 503), f"{r.status_code} {r.text}" E AssertionError: 404 {"detail":"Purchase not found for this admin"} E assert 404 in (400, 503) E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_verify_already_credited_idempotent
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_monetization_credits.py:325: in test_verify_already_credited_idempotent assert r.status_code in (400, 503) E assert 404 in (400, 503) E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_webhook_idempotent_payment_captured

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 1 ledger entry, got 0 assert 0 == 1

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_monetization_credits.py:396: in test_webhook_idempotent_payment_captured assert count == 1, f"Expected 1 ledger entry, got {count}" E AssertionError: Expected 1 ledger entry, got 0 E assert 0 == 1

testcase.name: test_history_returns_self_only
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_monetization_credits.py:448: in test_history_returns_self_only assert purchase_id in ids E AssertionError: assert 'purch_TEST_119a2cfee3' in []

testcase.name: test_public_wishes_cache_control
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_monetization_credits.py:512: in test_public_wishes_cache_control assert r.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
